Marianne Armenta, Esq. 415-289-5069 of Open Door Legal for Plaintiff BERNARDINE HALL-EVANS, who is also present.
Gabriel Rubin, Esq. 415-394-9400 Jackson Lewsi P.C. Special Appearance for Defendant Permanente Medical Group.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BERNARDINE HALL-EVANS' Motion To Set Aside Dismissal

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
